note.zh: 在 Claude Code 中以 Claude Opus 4.8（Max 思考配额）一次生成，本页为未经修改的原始产出。
note.en: Generated in one shot by Claude Opus 4.8 (Max effort) inside Claude Code; unmodified original output.

note.zh: 第二版：在 Claude Code 中由 Claude Opus 4.8（Max 思考配额）一次生成。基于 Three.js 的体素世界，含柏林噪声地形、第一人称 WASD + 鼠标视角、DDA 体素射线拾取的破坏/放置、程序化贴图图集，并自带大理石神庙、水晶尖塔与悬浮岛。代码由模型直接写出，仅做了一次 JS 语法检查，未做其他修改。
note.en: Second version: generated in one shot by Claude Opus 4.8 (Max effort) inside Claude Code. A Three.js voxel world with Perlin-noise terrain, first-person WASD + mouse-look, DDA voxel-raycast break/place, a procedural texture atlas, and a built-in marble temple, crystal spires and a floating sky-isle. Code written directly by the model; only a JS syntax check was run, otherwise unmodified.

note.zh: 在 Claude Code 中以 Claude Opus 4.8（Max 思考配额）一次生成。
note.en: Generated in one shot by Claude Opus 4.8 (Max effort) inside Claude Code.

note.zh: 第二版：在 Claude Code 中由 Claude Opus 4.8（Max 思考配额）一次手写的 SVG，未经修改。海边日落场景：渐变天空与海面、沙滩、远处帆船与海鸥，一只鹈鹕骑着红色自行车，并以速度线增添动感。
note.en: Second version: a hand-authored SVG written in one shot by Claude Opus 4.8 (Max effort) inside Claude Code; unmodified. A seaside sunset scene — gradient sky and sea, beach, a distant sailboat and gull, and a pelican riding a red bicycle, with motion lines for liveliness.
